title: pyrus campanulata
intro: Pyrus campanulata, also known as the mountain apple or Taiwan crabapple, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rosaceae. The bark, leaves, and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Pyrus campanulata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pyrus campanulata are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory infections.
